contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 10
- Description: fix: harden update_qr_code CLI with canonical labels
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/139
  
  Details:
  Added canonical_labels (QR Code, Associated Member, New Status, etc.) to update_qr_code.py to prevent label drift vs GAS parser. Previously canonical_labels=[] forced all labels through --attr verbatim, causing 'Associate Member' to not match the GAS regex 'Associated Member'. Audited all 35 CLI modules — update_qr_code was the only one with this gap. Deployed to Sophia via pip install.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 16.67

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
